class.name: FestivalNPCProfile
class.brief_description: The full authoring schema for one islander.
class.description: NPCs are layered systems, not one-note quest dispensers. Each profile carries a schedule per phase, weather variants, four kinds of guarded knowledge, and a data-driven list of conditional [member interactions] evaluated by [FestivalDirector]. Each schedule and variant is a [Dictionary] of free-form keys (typically [code]location[/code] and [code]activity[/code]). Each entry of [member interactions] is a [Dictionary] understood by the director, with optional keys such as [code]requires_outfit[/code], [code]requires_role[/code], [code]requires_items[/code], [code]requires_presented[/code], [code]requires_knowledge[/code], [code]requires_flags[/code], [code]requires_phase[/code], [code]requires_weather[/code], and outcome keys [code]grants_knowledge[/code], [code]sets_flags[/code], [code]gives_items[/code], [code]takes_items[/code], [code]advance_phase[/code] and [code]trigger_milestone[/code].

members.member: The outfit id this NPC themselves wears.
Knowledge id of the NPC's dark secret.
Knowledge id of an untrue belief about the NPC.
Unique identifier used by the registry.
Array of interaction [Dictionary] definitions evaluated by [FestivalDirector].
Knowledge id of a true rumor about the NPC.
Knowledge id of the NPC's guarded secret.
Keys merged over the phase schedule when it is raining.
Keys merged over the phase schedule when it is sunny.
